overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a high-tech industrial facility containing a large combat mech and yellow utility van. The player moves through a technical workshop area with schematic whiteboards, examines a towering mech unit up close, and navigates to an elevator lobby before returning to the main storage bay.

scene_state.functional_zone: technical workshop with mech schematic whiteboard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward while holding a pistol, approaching a technical whiteboard with mech diagrams

entered.detail: large whiteboard displaying technical diagrams and specifications for a humanoid mech unit
industrial yellow crane rails and equipment mounted on the ceiling
large bipedal combat mech with missile pods and white armor plating
transparent glass safety railing on upper level walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a high-tech industrial workshop with a large whiteboard displaying mech schematics directly ahead. The player moves forward past the whiteboard toward a distant mech unit visible through the facility's glass ceiling panels and yellow overhead crane system.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial storage bay with marked walls

events.description: turns left into open storage bay revealing yellow van and mech unit

agents.ego_description: walking along a wall with graffiti, then turning left to approach the main storage area

entered.detail: white tiled wall with blue 'KILL' graffiti and window openings
yellow utility van with black and white checkered pattern markings
large white storage container marked with 'C' and '02' identifiers

segments.scene_description: Moving along a wall marked with 'KILL' graffiti, the player turns left into a spacious storage bay. A yellow checkered van comes into view on the left while the industrial mech unit becomes more prominent in the center of the space.

events.description: stops walking to examine mech cockpit and leg details up close
resumes walking to circle around the mech unit

agents.ego_description: approaching the mech unit to examine its cockpit, missile pods, and tread legs in detail, then circling around it

entered.detail: circular missile pod arrays mounted on the mech's shoulders
open cockpit area with control interfaces and seating visible inside
heavy mechanical legs with tread systems and armor plating

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the massive mech unit for close inspection, revealing detailed mechanical components including missile pods, an open cockpit, and heavy tread legs. After examining the mech from the front, the player circles around to view it from the side as the yellow van shifts to the right of the frame.

events.description: enters covered elevator lobby with dimmer artificial lighting
turns around to return to the main storage bay

agents.ego_description: walking toward the elevator lobby, then turning back to return to the main storage area

entered.detail: corridor with elevator doors and geometric wall graphics
wall with abstract geometric patterns and wayfinding text
closed elevator doors with call buttons
stacked white industrial containers with directional markings

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the yellow van into a covered elevator lobby with dimmer artificial lighting and geometric wall murals. After reaching the elevator doors, the player turns back toward the main storage area, where the mech unit is now visible in the distance and the van appears on the opposite side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a high-tech industrial facility that transitions from a technical workshop into a vast storage bay and finally a dim elevator lobby. It begins by moving past a whiteboard of mech schematics toward a distant robotic unit visible beneath glass ceiling panels and a yellow crane system. As the camera passes a wall marked with graffiti, the space opens into a spacious bay where a yellow checkered van appears on the left and the massive mech unit becomes the central focus. The view then shifts to a close-up inspection of the mech's missile pods and open cockpit before circling around the machine and moving past the van. Finally, the scene transitions into a covered elevator lobby with dimmer lighting and geometric murals, before the camera turns back to reveal the mech and van receding into the distance of the main storage area.
